lineage.Process: ExportFeatures Berm D:\AltarValley_OctaviaAaron\Berm_Directionality.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "AREASYMBOL "AREASYMBOL" true true false 80 Text 0 0,First,#,Berm,AREASYMBOL,0,79;Fail_Type attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
